name: queue-aiops
summary: Governed AI-ops for redis + rabbitmq: memory-pressure/latency/queue-backlog/connection-churn RCAs, slowlog and SCAN-budgeted big-key sampling, queues/policies/nodes, and governed writes (config set, client kill, purge/delete queue, policies) with a built-in governance harness (audit, budget, undo, risk tiers)
